stemHtml: What is the definition of distress?

options.a: A condition concerning the safety of a person on board of an aircraft, or within sight, and requiring immediate assistance.
options.b: A condition concerning the attitude of an aircraft when intercepting the localizer during an ILS approach.
options.c: A condition of being threatened by serious and/or imminent danger and requiring immediate assistance.
options.d: A condition concerning the safety of an aircraft or of a person on board, but which does not require immediate assistance.
